name: 沈府卧房
description: 宽敞的卧房，中央为雕花大床，铺厚实被褥。床边设小几，放脉枕和药箱。窗边设软榻供休憩，榻上放针线筐，内有半成品虎头帽。墙上挂素雅字画，衣柜靠墙。地面铺地毯，光线柔和。整体布置舒适实用，有生活气息。
visual_reference: Ming Dynasty master bedroom, carved large bed with thick bedding, small table beside bed with pulse pillow and medicine chest, soft couch by window with sewing basket containing tiger-head hat in progress, plain elegant calligraphy on walls, wardrobe against wall, carpeted floor, soft comfortable lighting, lived-in practical space, warm domestic atmosphere
lighting: 窗外自然光柔和照入，室内明亮温暖
emotional_range: 得知怀孕的复杂情绪→沈词松口气→高令宁坚持和离
